subject: Adventurer's Discovery — generic explorer-class trainer NPC; humanoid figure in explorer outfit holding a Poke Ball in a forest setting
description: A humanoid figure dressed in an explorer-style outfit — including a wide-brimmed hat, light-colored practical clothing, and what appears to be a scarf or neck covering — stands in a bright outdoor forest or meadow setting. The figure holds a Poke Ball prominently in one hand with an enthusiastic posture. The background suggests a sunny natural environment with soft greens and light. The card is a Supporter Trainer card.
foreground: humanoid figure in explorer hat and light clothing, holding a Poke Ball, enthusiastic pose
background: sunny forest or meadow, green and warm light
